ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Supplier_Questionnaires' && TEXT(PRIORVALUE(Status__c)) = 'Pending Requestor' && ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Submitted') && $User.Title <> 'General Counsel ' && NOT(CONTAINS($Profile.Name, 'SW SalesOps')) && NOT ($Profile.Name = 'System Administrator') && NOT ($User.Division = 'Integration')
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You can't change the request status to submitted if it's Pending requester. you can change the status to resubmitted or any other status.
